core_issue: User cannot log in and receives a 403 error when accessing their account after last Tuesday's update.
human_summary: The customer reports being blocked from logging in with a 403 error at arcvault.io/user/jsmith; the issue started after last Tuesday's update and was observed this morning. They need access restored and confirmation of the root cause. Please check authentication/authorization changes from the update and review logs for 403 responses for this account.
